minaReleaseDateAndPlatforms.title: Mina the Hollower Release Date and Platforms
minaReleaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: Mina the Hollower is a single-player action-adventure by Yacht Club Games with multi-platform launch coverage.

items.details: Official site timing is May 29, 2026, while some storefront regions show May 28 based on local unlock windows.
PC storefront listings position Mina the Hollower as a premium action-adventure release with broad language support.
Switch 2 edition notes include enhanced display and feature upgrades compared with prior-generation hardware.
PlayStation listing confirms single-player support and remote play compatibility.
Xbox listing marks Mina the Hollower as optimized for modern Xbox hardware and achievement-ready.
Store pages highlight English plus major EU and Asian language coverage for global players.

minaReviewsAndScores.title: Mina the Hollower Reviews and Scores
minaReviewsAndScores.intro: Mina the Hollower opened with strong critic sentiment, especially around its combat pacing, level structure, and presentation.

items.details: Review summaries emphasize challenging encounters, rewarding exploration, and polished retro-modern direction.
OpenCritic reception reflects high recommendation rates and strong overall launch reception.
Coverage highlights world density, secrets, and how the game expands classic top-down action-adventure expectations.
Roundups consistently praise combat feel, boss design, and replay hooks.

minaBeginnerGuide.title: Mina the Hollower Beginner Guide
minaBeginnerGuide.intro: New players should focus on movement timing, burrow safety, and route discipline before pursuing riskier encounters.

items.title: Learn Mina the Hollower core objective
items.description: Push through Tenebrous Isle while balancing combat progression, exploration, and mission momentum.

items.title: Use burrowing for defense and control
items.description: Burrowing is both a mobility tool and a life-saving defensive rhythm during pressure-heavy fights.

items.title: Select a weapon that fits your tempo
items.description: Different starting weapons dramatically change spacing, commitment windows, and recovery timing.

items.title: Layer sidearms into your baseline plan
items.description: Sidearms cover matchup gaps and create safer answers for awkward enemy patterns.

items.title: Build trinket synergy early
items.description: Trinkets combine with upgrades to shape survivability, burst damage, and mobility consistency.

items.title: Clear each zone methodically
items.description: Secrets, upgrades, and alternate paths reward careful area-by-area progression.

minaWeaponsGuide.title: Mina the Hollower Weapons Guide
minaWeaponsGuide.intro: Each Mina the Hollower weapon supports a distinct risk profile, from balanced spacing tools to high-commitment power options.

items.best_for: Players who prefer stable spacing and consistent pressure windows.
Players who like rapid inputs, low commitment swings, and tight dodging.
Players comfortable trading speed for major impact and stagger potential.
Players who value blocking, parry timing, and controlled punish routes.
Players who enjoy resource loops and mixed-distance combat flow.

minaSidearmsAndTrinketsGuide.title: Mina the Hollower Sidearms and Trinkets Guide
minaSidearmsAndTrinketsGuide.intro: Use this guide to plan a practical loadout before a difficult route or boss fight by matching Sidearms, Trinkets, and Bone Up choices to your objective.

items.name: Volt Hatchet
items.description: Arcs forward with a shockwave and is excellent for crowd control and safer boss pressure.

items.name: Gyro Dagger
items.description: Returns like a boomerang for repeated hits and strong lane control against mobile enemies.

items.name: Movement Trinkets
items.description: Improve traversal and route comfort in bayou, water, ice, and secret-heavy exploration paths.

items.name: Plasma Vial Trinkets
items.description: Stabilize healing and recovery for long boss attempts where mistakes are costly.

items.name: Attack Bone Up
items.description: Prioritize faster boss kills and cleaner clears when you are confident in survival timing.

items.name: Defense Bone Up
items.description: Adds safety for first clears, unknown bosses, and dangerous map routes.

items.name: Boss Burst Loadout
items.description: Combine attack or Sidearm Damage upgrades with Volt Hatchet, Gyro Dagger, or Recall Disc.

items.name: Secret Hunter Loadout
items.description: Use movement Trinkets plus utility Sidearms to reach optional rooms and hidden pickups.

minaBossesAndAreasGuide.title: Mina the Hollower Bosses and Areas Guide
minaBossesAndAreasGuide.intro: This spoiler-light map module explains route intent, challenge style, and boss preparation across key Tenebrous Isle regions.

items.name: Tenebrous Isle
items.description: An interconnected gothic island with secrets, shortcuts, and more than 25 bosses and mini-bosses.

items.name: Ossex
items.description: The central city for regrouping and route planning before committing to harder generator paths.

items.name: Six Spark Generator Routes
items.description: Each generator path is boss-guarded and tests pattern reading, burrow timing, and punish windows.

items.name: Queensbury Crypts
items.description: A combat fundamentals route that rewards stable weapon selection and careful Joule management.

items.name: Bayou Zone
items.description: Movement, burrow timing, and positioning matter as much as raw damage in swamp-heavy sections.

items.name: Frozen Peaks
items.description: Surface control and movement planning are critical, making traversal Trinkets especially valuable.

minaRandomizerAndNewGamePlus.title: Mina the Hollower Randomizer and New Game Plus
minaRandomizerAndNewGamePlus.intro: Post-game replay in Mina the Hollower includes seven New Game Plus modes, seed sharing, randomizer settings, and wide modifier control.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, what changes in New Game Plus?
faqs.answer: Mina the Hollower includes seven New Game Plus modes with shuffled progression, mirrored world rules, and remix systems beyond simple damage scaling.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, how does randomizer change the start of a run?
faqs.answer: Randomizer can alter early weapon access by pulling opening choices from the full five-weapon pool, changing route pacing immediately.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, what can be randomized?
faqs.answer: Mina the Hollower randomizer settings can shuffle item locations and Sidearm placements, forcing adaptive exploration and boss preparation.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, what are seed codes used for?
faqs.answer: Seed codes let players share identical randomized world states for races, challenge runs, and route comparison.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, what modifiers are available?
faqs.answer: Modifiers can tune stats, difficulty, movement, and rule twists, including easier survival, harsher damage rules, and novelty challenges.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, what is the warp randomizer?
faqs.answer: A planned update for Mina the Hollower adds warp shuffling to remix doors, holes, and transition flow for stronger route variety.

faqs.question: In Mina the Hollower, who should start with New Game Plus before Randomizer?
faqs.answer: New Game Plus is the better first replay mode for players who want familiar structure, while Randomizer suits players with stronger item and route knowledge.

minaStoryAndCharacters.title: Mina the Hollower Story and Characters
minaStoryAndCharacters.intro: This story hub introduces Mina, Tenebrous Isle, and the failing Spark Generators without turning the homepage into a full plot summary.

items.name: Mina
items.description: Mina returns to restore failing Spark Generators and uncover the deeper crisis spreading across Tenebrous Isle.

items.name: Tenebrous Isle
items.description: A gothic island of eerie towns, crypts, bayous, castles, monsters, and cursed routes.

items.name: Ossex
items.description: The island's major powered city and Mina's main hub while surrounding regions collapse into danger.

items.name: Baron Lionel
items.description: Lionel commissioned the Spark project and brings Mina back, but the island's crisis runs deeper than repairs.

items.name: Spark Generators
items.description: Six failing generators define the main quest structure, each tied to dangerous regions and major bosses.

items.name: Thorne
items.description: A former ally tied to revolt and conflict, turning Mina's mission into a larger political and personal mystery.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Mina the Hollower

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, is Mina the Hollower a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Mina the Hollower is a singleplayer-only game with no multiplayer or co-op planned.

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, what are Sidearms and Trinkets used for?
questions.answer: In Mina the Hollower, Sidearms provide Joule-powered combat or utility actions, while Trinkets add passive effects that shape survivability, movement, and damage plans.

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, where can I play Mina the Hollower?
questions.answer: Mina the Hollower is available on PC and current-generation console platforms, with store support across Steam and major console storefronts.

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, does Mina the Hollower have New Game Plus and randomizer features?
questions.answer: Yes. Mina the Hollower includes New Game Plus modes, replay modifiers, and randomizer options designed for advanced reruns.

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, does Mina the Hollower support controllers?
questions.answer: Yes. Mina the Hollower supports controllers in addition to keyboard and mouse on supported platforms.

questions.question: In Mina the Hollower, why do routes feel non-linear?
questions.answer: Mina the Hollower is built around interconnected regions and flexible route selection, so players can switch objectives when a path becomes too risky.
